results.title: ‘Walang bibitaw’ spirit pays off as Philippines earns promotion to BJKC Group I
results.description: The Philippine women’s tennis team is heading to Group 1 after defeating Uzbekistan in a dramatic promotional playoff tie on Saturday at the National Tennis Centre in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

results.title: 2026 Newport Bermuda Race Fleet Sets Sail
results.description: The 2026 Newport Bermuda Race got underway in Newport with nearly 150 boats setting sail for Bermuda. A spokesperson said, “The 2026 Newport Bermuda Race is officially underway! A beautiful and somewhat blustery day in Newport set the scene for the beginning of the 54th Thrash To The Onion Patch. “The fleet left Narragansett Bay [...]
